channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says Fed rate increase would be a mistake ahead of Warsh's debut
item.description: I'm living with Kevin. I respect him, but when a country is doing well, it shouldn't be penalized by immediate...

item.title: Trump surprised as stocks fall despite strong jobs report. Barclays explains 'we are entering the warning zone'
item.description: With a great Jobs Report, stocks should go up, not down, Trump posted. That's how it was for 200 years. Growth does not me...

item.title: Trump calls Iran conflict a 'military exercise' as Hormuz fighting escalates, denies promising no new wars
item.description: First of all, I didn't guarantee no war, Trump claimed. Why would I have built the strongest military in the world?

item.title: OpenAI prepares 'superapp' shift ahead of planned IPO, FT reports
item.description: The strategy is driven by the belief that the future of AI lies in autonomous agents capable of handling complex, multi-step tasks.
